imap.error: 535 5.7.139 Authentication failed - App Password may be invalid or account requires additional security verification

smtp.error: 535 5.7.139 Client not authenticated to send mail - STARTTLS required before AUTH

troubleshooting: Verify app password was generated correctly at https://account.microsoft.com/security
Ensure Modern Authentication is enabled for the account
Check if account has Conditional Access policies blocking IMAP/SMTP
Try using OAuth2 authentication instead of basic auth
